---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**Priority order (which one does this address?)**
1. Smart home device feel (Alexa-like)
2. Local agent capabilities (OpenClaw-like)
3. UX polish
4. Hybrid gateway (external OpenClaw / Hermes)
5. Refactor / quality
6. OSS project health

**Problem**
A description of the user need.

**Proposed solution**
What you have in mind.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why they're less ideal.

**Additional context**
Links to reference projects, screenshots, whatever helps.
